name: Mike Alvarez
title: Outdoor Gear Tester
bio: Mike is a former wilderness guide who field-tests camping, hiking, and survival gear in real conditions across the western US.
longBio: Mike Alvarez spent seven years as a backcountry wilderness guide before joining TrailNestCo as a staff Outdoor Gear Tester. He runs TrailNestCo's field-testing program for tents, sleeping systems, cookware, and water filtration, putting every product through multi-night trips before it's scored. Mike holds a Wilderness First Responder certification and contributes the technical durability notes you'll see in TrailNestCo's camping and backpacking reviews.
